relationships.text: Pretends to mentor The Kissass Offspring, but privately despises them and thinks they are a moron unfit to lead.
Is suspicious of The Spoilt Offspring because they know The Spoilt Offspring spoke often and privately with J. Baroo near the end.
Thinks The Surviving Spouse was sidelined long ago and has little useful to add.
Was told to hide The Father's Bastard inside the company and views them as a nuisance to be managed.
Was childhood friends with The Diplomat and J. Baroo, but has fallen out of touch with The Diplomat. The distance is mutual.
Is in cahoots with The Opera Singer, had an affair with them, and learned the truth about The Father's Bastard through them.
Sees The Publicist / Journalist as a useful ally in protecting the image and brand of Baroo Holdings.
Hates The Antique Collector for risking the company brand through stolen artefacts and provenance scandals.
Believes The Director is their mentor and safest ally in succession.
Despises The Spoilt Offspring, seeing them as a brat, a drain, and someone who never worked for anything.
Loves The Surviving Spouse and believes they need protection from the world.
Does not know The Father's Bastard is family; sees them as an irritating colleague whom J. Baroo inexplicably kept around the house and company.
Knows little about The Diplomat, but feels the urge to impress them because they were one of J. Baroo's old friends.
Has a crush on The Opera Singer but does not understand why they were so close to J. Baroo.
Looks down on The Publicist / Journalist because they are lower on the company payroll, despite relying on their image work.
Is charmed by The Antique Collector and the impressive objects and stories they bring.
Respects The Director and thinks of them as a mentor.
Thinks The Kissass Offspring is a fool, simple, and painfully over-serious.
Pities and loves The Surviving Spouse, while recognising their vulnerability.
Has figured out The Father's Bastard's identity and considers them an embarrassment.
Is fond of The Diplomat because they have often caught up together overseas over the years.
Dislikes The Opera Singer intensely and sees them as a threat to the family's dignity.
Likes The Publicist / Journalist and thinks they are good for the company and useful in hiding problems with the Historical Foundation.
Knows about The Antique Collector's thefts and has personally profited from selling stolen artefacts with them.
Likes The Director, but worries they may not be good for the family in this moment.
Loves The Kissass Offspring but thinks they need protection from their own idiocy.
Loves The Spoilt Offspring, but is slightly scared by the ruthlessness they have seen beneath the charm.
Loves The Father's Bastard and has been their major support, bringing them back into the family in line with J. Baroo's wishes.
Does not really like The Diplomat because they knew about the adultery with The Opera Singer and said nothing.
Hates The Opera Singer, seeing them as an adulterer and a terrible parent.
Worries The Publicist / Journalist helped make J. Baroo distance himself from The Father's Bastard, but has no proof.
Is charmed by The Antique Collector.
Likes The Director because they arranged a job for them inside the company.
Thinks The Kissass Offspring is an idiot, but basically a good person, and wants to be friends despite the difficulty.
Thinks The Spoilt Offspring is spoilt and tries to placate them, but is definitely not their friend.
Loves The Surviving Spouse for protecting them and bringing them into the family.
Does not know The Diplomat well and does not understand how much The Diplomat knows about the family situation.
Does not know The Opera Singer is their real parent; that truth has been hidden from them.
Finds The Publicist / Journalist cold to them at work and does not understand why.
Does not know The Antique Collector.
Was once part of the same childhood circle as J. Baroo and The Director, but has fallen out of touch with The Director. The distance is mutual and slightly sour.
Is patronising towards The Kissass Offspring, seeing them as spoonfed, sheltered, and short on real experience.
Is fond of The Spoilt Offspring because they often crossed paths overseas while growing up.
Is fond of The Surviving Spouse, but feels ashamed for knowing about the adultery with The Opera Singer and saying nothing.
Knows about The Father's Bastard and is embarrassed by the whole situation on J. Baroo's behalf.
Knows The Opera Singer and is embarrassed by the adultery, slightly blaming them for the scandal.
Knows little of The Publicist / Journalist beyond their role around the Baroo brand.
Is very suspicious of The Antique Collector because reports about the artefacts have crossed their desk.
Believes they are in cahoots with The Director and is slightly enamoured with them.
Thinks The Kissass Offspring is an idiot.
Hates The Spoilt Offspring.
Is ashamed in front of The Surviving Spouse, but would make the same choices again.
Secretly hates The Father's Bastard for what they represent, while being deeply ashamed of that feeling.
Tries to ingratiate themself with The Diplomat, knowing The Diplomat is embarrassed by the adultery and may judge them for it.
Does not know The Publicist / Journalist personally.
Often works internationally with The Antique Collector at functions and elite events.
The Director is their boss, but they do not think much more of them than that.
Thinks The Kissass Offspring is an idiot.
Believes The Spoilt Offspring is exactly what they appear to be and is not concerned unless they damage the brand.
Does not know The Surviving Spouse personally, but wants them to avoid doing anything rash for the sake of the Baroo brand.
Wants to smother the existence of The Father's Bastard at all costs and has been very successful so far.
Knows The Diplomat and constantly tries to use their association with the Baroo family for brand benefit.
Sees The Opera Singer as a liability.
Is concerned about The Antique Collector due to recent bad press and repeated requests to suppress stories about stolen artefacts.
Thinks The Director will be another rube to charm or manipulate.
Thinks The Kissass Offspring is a rube, easily charmed by grand stories and impressive objects.
Has worked with The Spoilt Offspring to sell stolen artefacts.
Thinks The Surviving Spouse is a rube.
Does not know The Father's Bastard.
Thinks The Diplomat knows more than they admit about the stolen works and keeps trying to bribe or soften them with trinkets.
Is scared by how much The Opera Singer knows about the stolen works.
Expects The Publicist / Journalist to do their job and keep the press quiet, and is arrogant towards them.
